# Vendored Source Notice

This directory contains vendored Ultralytics YOLO / YOLO26 source code.

- Upstream repository: https://github.com/ultralytics/ultralytics
- Vendored commit: `10d17c168cb6ff891d8c763c06c83dee53d4c75e`
- License: AGPL-3.0
- License file: `LICENSE`
- Citation file: `CITATION.cff`

The upstream `.git` directory is intentionally not included in this vendored
copy. To update this source, fetch the upstream repository separately, review
the license and release notes, then replace this directory deliberately.
